vocab.meaning: những địa điểm bí mật, ít người biết
vocab.example: My friends and I prefer scouting for clandestine spots in the city rather than visiting overcrowded tourist traps.

vocab.meaning: giao lưu trực tiếp (ngoài đời thực)
vocab.example: In an era of digital connectivity, we make a conscious effort to socialize in person at local plazas.

vocab.meaning: khu vực vui chơi giải trí ngoài trời
vocab.example: We frequently congregate at various recreational grounds to engage in some amateur sports or light exercise.

vocab.meaning: tận hưởng bầu không khí xung quanh
vocab.example: There is nothing better than sitting at a park bench with a close friend to soak up the evening ambiance.

vocab.meaning: một sự thay đổi khung cảnh/không khí
vocab.example: Heading to a botanical garden provides a much-needed change of scenery after being cooped up in the office all week.

vocab.meaning: không gian công cộng/không gian dân sự
vocab.example: I believe well-maintained civic spaces are essential for friends to gather and engage in meaningful dialogue.

vocab.meaning: có lợi/phù hợp cho việc trò chuyện
vocab.example: We often seek out quiet corners in public libraries that are more conducive to deep conversation than noisy cafes.

vocab.meaning: tụ tập với số lượng lớn
vocab.example: During national holidays, my entire friend group tends to gather en masse at the city’s central square.
While wandering through the park, we often stumble across street performers who make our outings far more entertaining.

vocab.meaning: các khu vực dành riêng cho người đi bộ
vocab.example: We usually opt for pedestrianized zones where we can walk freely and window-shop without the hassle of traffic.
